input: Full wipe of a >=MIN_TASKS board restores every file
A 1->0 drop is below signature: not restored, no incident without manifest
1->0 with manifest present logs a below-signature audit line
Live lease defers restore (latch); release lets next tick restore
Stale lease past TTL is overridden and restore proceeds
Newer result.json journal is never clobbered; siblings restore
Manifest-expected task is not pruned from the shadow on gradual delete
Non-manifest gradual delete prunes the shadow
Restore never follows a planted symlink out of the list dir
A board that grows over ticks is mirrored, never restored
A wipe from exactly MIN_TASKS trips the signature
